query:
-- For each campaign that has mood board images but no primary set,
-- mark the image with the lowest sortOrder as primary
UPDATE campaign_mood_board_images mb
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT MIN(id) as min_id, campaignId
  FROM campaign_mood_board_images
  WHERE campaignId IN (
    SELECT c.id FROM campaigns c
    WHERE c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl IS NULL
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_mood_board_images WHERE campaignId = c.id)
  )
  GROUP BY campaignId
) first_img ON mb.id = first_img.min_id
SET mb.isPrimary = 1;

-- For each campaign that has mood board images but no primary set,
-- mark the image with the lowest sortOrder as primary
UPDATE campaign_mood_board_images mb
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT MIN(id) as min_id, campaignId
  FROM campaign_mood_board_images
  WHERE campaignId IN (
    SELECT c.id FROM campaigns c
    WHERE c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl IS NULL
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_mood_board_images WHERE campaignId = c.id)
  )
  GROUP BY campaignId
) first_img ON mb.id = first_img.min_id
SET mb.isPrimary = 1;
